turns.content: I’ve been waiting for hours. This place is useless.
All right, you can go home if you don’t want to cooperate.
Wow. That’s helpful.
We’re not dealing with this behavior tonight.
You’re not even listening to me.
If you keep shouting, I’ll have to call security.
Go ahead. I don’t care.
That’s your choice.
This is ridiculous.
There’s the door if you want to leave.
Unbelievable.
I’m done arguing with you.
I don’t feel safe here.
I’m sorry you’re feeling that way — I’m here with you.
I just don’t trust what’s happening.
That makes sense. Let me explain what’s going on.
Okay…
We’ll take this one step at a time together.
That helps a bit.
You’re doing really well talking about this.
I’m still nervous though.
That’s okay — we’ll go at your pace.
Alright.
You’re safe here.
WHat is taking so long? I’ve been waiting for hours.
The doctor is reviewing charts right now. we'll get to you as soon as we can.
How long will it take? my arm is killing me
I don’t have an exact time yet, please sit down sir
No. I want to see someone now!!
i'm sorry sir. Could you rate your pain level from 1 to 10?
Fuck that bullshit. I dont care about that.
Sir, Please keep your voice down so we can help you.
No Bitch..
I understand you are frustrated. but fuck you too dude!!
WHat did you say??
Idiot says what?
What?
{laughs}
Nobody cares about patients here.
You need to calm down.
Don’t tell me what to do.
I can’t help you if you keep yelling.
See? You’re blaming me.
I’m sorry — I want to understand what’s upsetting you.
I’ve just been waiting too long.
That sounds frustrating. Let me check for you.
Okay…
Thank you for being patient.
That’s better.
I’ll stay with you while we sort this out.
Excuse me, I have a question.
Sure, what do you need?
I pressed the call button earlier.
We’ve been busy this evening.
That’s not my fault.
You’ll have to wait like everyone else.
That’s rude.
I’m not arguing about this.
Wow.
If you keep complaining, I’ll leave.
Fine.
Suit yourself.
